project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces and turbo for task orchestration
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with turbo. Each package has its own package.json with 'typecheck' and 'test' scripts.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals: true, environment: 'node'. Tests live in src/__tests__/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run typecheck: pnpm --filter @quant/sync-engine typecheck. 2. Run tests: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run in the package directory.
setup_instructions: pnpm install in repo root installs all workspace packages
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registry. Node >=22.0.0, TypeScript ~5.5.0.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. TypeScript strict, no 'any'. Zod for schemas. Every new file gets a .test.ts.
key_patterns: Packages use 'type': 'module', 'main': 'src/index.ts', 'types': 'src/index.ts'. tsconfig extends ../../tsconfig.json with composite: true. vitest.config.ts per package with globals: true, environment: 'node'. Tests use describe/it/expect from vitest. Dependencies include zod for validation.
directory_structure: packages/ contains shared libs. Each package: package.json, tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts, src/ with index.ts barrel and __tests__/ for tests.
